name: leadgenerator
description: Lightweight, zero-dependency Lead Generator and Manager powered by LLMs

scripts.test: node tests/test-parsing.mjs && node tests/test-pipeline.mjs && node tests/test-extraction.mjs
scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p node_modules && cd node_modules && (test -d achillesAgentLib || git clone https://github.com/OutfinityResearch/achillesAgentLib.git)
